description_long: This is a rolled cake, commonly known as a Swiss roll, featuring a light, spongy exterior dusted with powdered sugar and cocoa. The cake is filled with a creamy white filling, possibly whipped cream or buttercream, and has visible swirls of filling and cake throughout its cross-section. On top, there is a decorative dollop of whipped cream, adorned with a red raspberry, a slice of orange, and a single blueberry, adding vibrant color and texture contrast. The cake sits on a dark, rectangular wooden board, which serves as its display base. The surface of the cake is slightly uneven, with a rustic, homemade appearance, and the decorations are neatly placed at the center of the roll. The overall presentation is inviting and visually appealing, suitable for a bakery display or café setting.
description: A rustic Swiss roll cake with a creamy swirl filling, topped with whipped cream and fresh fruit, displayed on a dark wooden board.
description_view_0: Front view showing the spiral cross-section of the cake, creamy filling, and fruit-topped whipped cream.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the cake roll, dusted exterior, and visible fruit decorations on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed end of the cake roll and the fruit-topped whipped cream from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cake's length, textured surface, and the fruit decorations from a different angle.
